rules.section: Building Ontario Businesses Initiative Act, 2022, S.O. 2022, c.16, Sched.3
rules.reason: BOBI 2022 directs Ontario public sector entities to give preference to Ontario businesses for procurement below the trade-agreement thresholds. Removing this clause may breach the Act for in-scope procurement.
rules.remediation_hint: Confirm the procurement falls below applicable trade-agreement thresholds (CFTA, CETA, CUSMA) before removing Ontario-preference language; above threshold, BOBI does not apply and CFTA Art. 502 governs.
rules.notes: DIRECT CONFLICT with cfta-502-localpref above CFTA threshold. Engine surfaces both — counsel determines which governs based on procurement value.
